name: Corned Beef#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the corned beef in a crockpot and cover it with just enough water to barely submerge.
2. Add onion, garlic, and bay leaves.
3. Cook on LOW for 9-10 hours.
4. If serving cabbage, remove the corned beef from the pot.
5. Heat the broth back up to HIGH.
6. Drop wedges of cabbage into the hot broth.
7. Cover and cook for an additional 15-20 minutes.
8. Remove the corned beef and cabbage from the crockpot and serve.
